title: ribes howellii
intro: Ribes howellii, also known as Howell's currant, is a species of flowering plant in the gooseberry family. The plant is rich in anthocyanins, which have been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ribes howellii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in jams, jellies, and other culinary applications.
